description_long: This guard rail consists of three horizontal black rails supported by four vertical posts. The posts are a reddish-brown color with yellowish caps, and they are evenly spaced along the length of the rail. The rails appear to be made of metal, likely steel, and are cylindrical in shape, running parallel to each other. The posts are rectangular and robust, suggesting they are designed to be anchored securely into the ground. The ends of the rails are blunt and terminate at the outermost posts without any additional end treatment. There are no visible reflective markings or panels on the surface of the guard rail.
description: A three-rail black metal guard rail with four reddish-brown vertical posts and yellow caps, designed for urban roadside or pedestrian protection. The rails are cylindrical and the posts are rectangular, with no visible reflective markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail with all three horizontal rails and four vertical posts visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with the posts and rails aligned and only the thickness of the posts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three rails and four posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the posts and rails.
